Appearances:
Plaintiff Rogel Carranza is present.
Attorney, Arnold W. Evje is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Judy Landis is present.
Attorney, Michael Spalding is representing the defendants.

The Judge Pro Tem Steven Derby, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 504 A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of March 30, 2015 remains on calendar.
